descs.desc:
[BeforeAttack] Gain +(highest Reson. + 1) [Charge] Count (max 7)
- At 4+ Envy Reson., gain +7 [Charge] Count instead
[BeforeAttack] Consume all [Charge] Count on self. Deal +2% damage for every [Charge] Count consumed (max 30%)
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Binding] next turn
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [IDMicroChip]
[OnSucceedAttack] Gain +1~2 [Charge] Count

descs.desc:
[CantIdentify]
Prioritizes targets with the most HP
[BeforeAttack] At less than 10 [Charge] Count, take 10% HP damage and gain +10 [Charge] Count
(this effect does not kill or Stagger this unit)
[BeforeAttack] Gain +(highest Reson. + 1) [Charge] Count (max 8)
- At 5+ Envy Reson., gain +8 [Charge] Count instead
[BeforeAttack] Consume all [Charge] Count on self. Deal +3% damage for every [Charge] Count consumed (max 50%)
coinDescs:
If target has [IDMicroChip], deal +20% damage
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Binding] next turn
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [IDMicroChip]
[OnSucceedAttack] Gain +1~2 [Charge] Count
[EnemyKill] Gain +2 [Charge] Count

2070911.name: Circuit Wiring
2070911.desc: On Hit with Skills that apply [Combustion] Potency or 'Unique Burn[TabExplain]', or On Hit with Envy Skills: Inflict additional [Combustion] Potency on target by half of the Skill's total Coins (rounded up; max 3 times per turn)
